items.title: Elements of Information Theory (Cover & Thomas)
items.author: Thomas M. Cover, Joy A. Thomas
items.note: Standard textbook treatment of entropy, conditional entropy, mutual information, and the data-processing inequality.

items.title: scikit-learn — mutual_info_classif
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Documentation for estimating I(X_i; Y) in feature-selection pipelines with discrete/continuous handling.

items.title: scikit-learn — normalized_mutual_info_score
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Reference for NMI clustering evaluation and averaging options.

items.title: A Mathematical Theory of Communication (Shannon, 1948)
items.author: Claude E. Shannon
items.note: Original foundation for entropy and information measures from which mutual information developed.
